home.headline: Merge & clean Garmin .FIT activity files
home.subhead: Stitch a split activity back together. Remove GPS jitter from break spots. All in your browser — your files never leave your device.
home.drop: Drop one or more .fit files here
home.two_files_hint: Add 2 files to merge them. Add 1 file to clean GPS jitter.

local.title: 100% local
local.body: Your .FIT files are processed entirely in your browser. Nothing is uploaded.

offline.title: Works offline
offline.body: Install as a PWA. Use it in the field, no internet required.

open.title: Open source
open.body: MIT-licensed on GitHub. Audit the code, fork it, run it yourself.

free.title: No accounts, no ads
free.body: No login. No tracking. No analytics. Free forever.

clean.title: GPS jitter scan
clean.instruct: Tick the clusters you want to flatten. Each will be replaced by a single point at the centroid; timestamps and sensor data are preserved.
clean.selected_summary: Selected: {{n}} of {{total}} · would remove {{km}} km of fake distance · {{dur}} of stops

errors.not_fit: {{name}} doesn't look like a valid .FIT file.
